rulesVersion.name: Kill Team 3rd Edition - Approved Ops 2025 live baseline
notes: Uses official Warhammer Community downloads and the Kill Team app as living-rule references.
Approved Ops update log includes April 2026 errata for Dominate, Sweep and Clear, and earlier Crit/Tac Op changes.
Score prompts are short aids, not full official rules text.

tacOps.name: Flank
tacOps.prompt: Track flank control from TP2 onward. April/January updates clarify flank contesting and TP4 scoring.

tacOps.name: Retrieval
tacOps.prompt: Track Retrieve actions and carried retrieval markers. January update restricts first-turn and engagement use.

tacOps.name: Scout Enemy Movement
tacOps.prompt: Track monitored enemy operatives from TP2 onward.

tacOps.name: Envoy
tacOps.prompt: Choose a different Envoy each eligible turning point; track territory and wound condition.

tacOps.name: Plant Banner
tacOps.prompt: Track banner placement, whether it remains in enemy territory, and contesting.

tacOps.name: Martyrs
tacOps.prompt: Track first incapacitation on objectives; April commentary confirms unusual incapacitation sources.

tacOps.name: Rout
tacOps.prompt: Track qualifying incapacitations near the opponent's drop zone.

tacOps.name: Sweep and Clear
tacOps.prompt: Track cleared objective markers and Swept tokens. April update changes VP wording.

tacOps.name: Dominate
tacOps.prompt: Track Dominate tokens on qualifying incapacitations. April update changes token gain for 12+ wound operatives.

tacOps.name: Track Enemy
tacOps.prompt: Track concealed friendly operatives near enemies who cannot target them.

tacOps.name: Plant Devices
tacOps.prompt: Track device tokens planted on objectives and enemy contesting.

tacOps.name: Steal Intelligence
tacOps.prompt: Track Intelligence markers dropped by incapacitated enemy operatives and carried by your operatives.

critOps.name: Secure
critOps.prompt: Core objective-control pattern. Score by turning point using the official card/app wording.

critOps.name: Loot
critOps.prompt: Core objective interaction pattern. Score by turning point using the official card/app wording.

critOps.name: Transmission
critOps.prompt: Core objective interaction pattern. Score by turning point using the official card/app wording.

critOps.name: Orb
critOps.prompt: Track the Orb marker location and objective control from TP2 onward.

critOps.name: Stake Claim
critOps.prompt: Select and resolve claimed objectives from TP2 onward. Update log changes timing wording.

critOps.name: Energy Cells
critOps.prompt: Track carried objective markers and control from TP2 onward. Update log changes timing wording.

critOps.name: Download
critOps.prompt: Track Download actions and objective control in later turning points.

critOps.name: Data
critOps.prompt: Track Data objective requirements by turning point using the official card/app wording.

critOps.name: Reboot
critOps.prompt: Track Reboot objective requirements by turning point using the official card/app wording.
